message:
feat: major expansion of core engine modules — storage adapter, TEE policy, conformance, and lowering pipeline

Storage Adapter (storage_adapter.rs +995):
- Full persistence layer with SQLite-backed artifact storage, TTL eviction,
  transactional writes, and evidence-linked retrieval for benchmark/conformance
  pipeline integration

TEE Attestation Policy (tee_attestation_policy.rs +1021):
- Comprehensive attestation policy engine with configurable trust anchors,
  revocation freshness gates, attestation chain validation, and evidence
  classification for hardware-rooted trust decisions

Test262 Release Gate (test262_release_gate.rs +1006):
- ES2020 compliance gate with deterministic pass/fail thresholds, waiver
  management, observed result tracking, and release-blocking enforcement

Lowering Pipeline (lowering_pipeline.rs +1094):
- Extended IR lowering with additional optimization passes, SSA construction
  refinements, and control flow graph normalization

Safe Mode Fallback (safe_mode_fallback.rs +895):
- Expanded attestation health routing with graduated response policies,
  emergency grant workflows, and deterministic fallback decisions

Conformance Harness (conformance_harness.rs +1160):
- Enhanced test orchestration with structured result collection, artifact
  persistence, and step-indexed execution logging

Receipt Verifier Pipeline (receipt_verifier_pipeline.rs +657):
- Extended three-layer verification with transparency log consistency checks
  and chain-of-custody audit improvements

Also updates: benchmark_e2e (+468), security_e2e (+440), error_code (+453),
release_checklist_gate (+710), ts_normalization (+879), incident_replay_bundle (+151),
control_plane/mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
